response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with roughly 17 years of hands-on development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and has recently begun contributing to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI and cloud platform strategy expertise, a demonstrated track record advising enterprise customers, and ideally an advanced degree in an AI-related field. His AI exposure is limited to approximately one year of agentic infrastructure work, his cloud experience is surface-level, and there is no evidence of the strategic advisory capacity, customer-facing thought leadership, or platform-scale AI product ownership the role requires.
strengths: 17+ years of broad engineering experience across multiple languages, platforms, and domains satisfies the minimum tenure requirement
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq demonstrates genuine, current engagement with agentic AI tooling
Founding and sustaining GISCollective as an open-source geospatial platform shows entrepreneurial initiative and end-to-end product ownership
concerns: No master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and meaningful AI work spans only ~1 year — far below the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms' the role expects at director level
Cloud experience is narrow and incidental (AWS CDK on a pricing team) with no evidence of cloud architecture strategy, platform design, or multi-cloud depth

Entire career history is hands-on individual development with no demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners, or operating in a technology-evangelist or strategic-IC capacity at scale

key_factors.factor: No strategic advisory or customer-facing leadership experience
Broad engineering tenure meeting minimum threshold
